content.summary: Synthetic identity ownership signal used to rehearse the reviewed record chain.

case_workflow.observation_scope_statement: Synthetic identity ownership signal requires reviewed notification before customer-like release gate sign-off.
case_workflow.triage_rationale: The signal is low risk but must remain approval-bound for launch-gate evidence.
case_workflow.intended_outcome: Notify the accountable identity owner after a separate human approval decision.

action.message_intent: Notify the accountable identity owner about the reviewed rehearsal signal.
action.escalation_reason: Phase 37 customer-like release gate requires one approval-bound low-risk action replay.

approval.decision_rationale: Synthetic rehearsal chain is in reviewed low-risk scope.

approved.description: Approved path records a human approval decision before the execution receipt and reconciliation evidence.

denied.message_intent: Document the denied owner notification rehearsal without dispatch.
denied.escalation_reason: Phase 46.2 denial rehearsal must preserve the rejection decision as the terminal review evidence.
denied.intended_outcome: Notify the accountable identity owner only when the reviewed decision permits follow-up.
denied.decision_rationale: The synthetic request is intentionally denied for fallback rehearsal evidence.

fallback.message_intent: Record the approved fallback rehearsal without dispatching the execution surface.
fallback.escalation_reason: Phase 46.2 fallback rehearsal needs clean manual follow-up evidence after approval.
fallback.intended_outcome: Notify the accountable identity owner only when the reviewed fallback record preserves follow-up evidence.
fallback.decision_rationale: The synthetic fallback request remains in reviewed low-risk scope.
fallback.reason: The rehearsal simulates downstream timeout before any execution receipt exists.
fallback.action_taken: Recorded manual fallback evidence only; no high-risk action or executor dispatch was performed.
fallback.residual_uncertainty: Awaiting a future explicit execution receipt before reconciliation can be considered matched.

escalation.message_intent: Escalate the pending approval rehearsal without approving or dispatching the action.
escalation.escalation_reason: Phase 46.2 escalation rehearsal preserves pending review state and explicit human accountability.
escalation.intended_outcome: Notify the accountable identity owner only after the escalated human review is complete.
escalation.note: Pending approval rehearsal escalated for explicit human ownership; no approval or execution receipt exists.
